textByHash.0194c1356132c5a0f6c09854b46bca6994326458: Agility Arena guy with a Parrot pet made it lighter for me and Kaqemeex convinced the Nardah herbalist to make potions for me if I wear it and he attached a pestle and mortar, toos.
textByHash.25bf0ee1d33f9ff7bfe4b9a3f7b70bd6c4e37078: You don't have that cape. Choose another.
textByHash.379595fc38ffa0de9d98a856e36220957a359352: Duradel convinced all Slayer masters to give me a chance at repeating an assignment and the Hunting Expert added some useful teleports, too.
textByHash.3ef872609c4b3db857082c5694d42b12e7b41d35: Ignatius Vulcan added a torch for lighting up caves and the Woodcutting tutor made it easier to find bird's nests and Martin the Master Farmer made it yield more herbs.
textByHash.51e85c983c7f2f3999e81108c2b662ce944ed93d: Martin Thwait made the cape better for being sneaky and the Master Crafter added a teleport to his guild before Hickton attached some grapples and a crossbow.
textByHash.59ce54a7c6f21b10d29eded9826e65fc14f12a7b: Yip. No cost. What cape do you want a hood for?
textByHash.73a8be36a7a8eb6f8a038d4661c156774e58a31f: Yip. Show me the goods. I pay 80%.
textByHash.765abd60bd94c01db4ff44121b736a3e686480db: Melee combat tutor added a ring of life function and the armour salesman at the Ranging guild added a magnet and undead chicken thing.
textByHash.87b07bd74b08da90a3fd2f4a267aed20d2ada88a: All the things other skillcapes do.
textByHash.9f5a62162a87ff04f4483a69ffd45605e6012ebd: Brother Jered attached a holy wrench and Wizard Sinina enchanted the cape so I can change me spellbook.
textByHash.a30ef1f9ecd55cfe7bace0eda5dcbcd1903c9483: A dwarf gave it a chance to give me extra ores and another dwarf made it give more experience when making gold bars and the Master Chef stopped it from burning any food.
textByHash.c9705c5acc1e5be39f346113c60925e2026d6822: Aubury attached all of the runecrafting tiaras, an estate agent sold me some teleports and one of the nurses at the Emir's Arena made it give me faster hitpoints.
textByHash.d705c22a950bb920587cac7a5364ffe69a0dff94: Fine... Ajjat gave me unlimited teleports to his Warrior's guild and Kamfreena lets me fight her Cyclopes without needing those annoying tokens.
